feed.title: chiayeechew TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from chiayeechew

entry.title: Wanna be “seggsy”? All you need is love & good hygiene! @FOXYAFFAIRS.SG on IG offered 3-steps intimate care routine, Kitty Rinse for cleansing, Kitty Scrub for exfoliating & Kitty Drops for moisturising.
entry.content: Wanna be “seggsy”? All you need is love & good hygiene! @FOXYAFFAIRS.SG on IG offered 3-steps intimate care routine, Kitty Rinse for cleansing, Kitty Scrub for exfoliating & Kitty Drops for moisturising.

entry.title: When you asked for help with the dinner but you want to do TikTok. :/ #tiktoksingapore #trending #tiktokmalaysia #captetown #pringlebay #cookwithme

entry.title: Pleasant surprise to find a grand piano in a wine yard cottage. #tulbagh #wineyard #tiktoksingapore #tiktokmalaysia #trending #captetown #piano #pianocover #saronsberg #canon
entry.content: Pleasant surprise to find a grand piano in a wine yard cottage. #tulbagh #wineyard #tiktoksingapore #tiktokmalaysia #trending #captetown #piano #pianocover #saronsberg #canon

entry.title: I have recently fell in love with this affordable perfume with floral scents from @nefertumfragrances. It has an intense rose and vanila scent which I like it so much! They have range of perfume and you can always visit them at Takashimaya main atrium fr
entry.content: I have recently fell in love with this affordable perfume with floral scents from @nefertumfragrances. It has an intense rose and vanila scent which I like it so much! They have range of perfume and you can always visit them at Takashimaya main atrium from 22 Feb to 5 Mar & 15 Mar to 2 Apr. (1000hr - 2130hr) #perfumetiktok #floralscents #difuser #nefertumsg #perfumecheck

entry.title: Say hello to my personal cameraman & travelling companion @Pivo_SG! It’s compact, portable & easy to set up~ get yours with PIVOF45C3 from Shopee: pivo_official_store.sg #Pivo #ReelsMatePivo #TiktokMatePivo #iShootPivo #PivoPlayful #PivoSG #tiktoksingap
entry.content: Say hello to my personal cameraman & travelling companion @Pivo_SG! It’s compact, portable & easy to set up~ get yours with PIVOF45C3 from Shopee: pivo_official_store.sg #Pivo #ReelsMatePivo #TiktokMatePivo #iShootPivo #PivoPlayful #PivoSG #tiktoksingapore #tiktokmalaysia #traveltiktok #travelvlog #southafrica #capetown

entry.title: My dad’s my best mate, and always will be.💕 #daddysgirl #tiktoksingapore #tiktokmalaysia #familygoals #dancechallenge #youngdaddy
